queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(c.c_custkey), COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
LEFT JOIN tpch_sf1.orders AS o
  ON c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey;

theorem.description: Count rows after LEFT JOIN from CUSTOMER to ORDERS
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-LEFT-CUSTOMER-ORDERS
